statement: In every magma, Equation 3248 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * u) * y`) implies Equation 4003 (`x * y = (z * (x * w)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0496
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) u) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op x w)) w)
